Title: Graphic Print Pocket Tee - Minimalist Urban Scene Top
Description:
Capture the perfect blend of casual comfort and subtle style with our graphic pocket tee. Designed for everyday wear, this soft, breathable top features a charming, vibrant print centered on the chest pocket, adding a unique focal point to the minimalist silhouette.

  • Supreme Comfort: Crafted from a lightweight, soft-feel fabric that is perfect for all-day wear, ensuring breathability and ease of movement.
  • Versatile Style: The pale, muted sage green color makes this tee incredibly easy to pair with various bottoms, from high-waisted jeans to chinos.
  • Unique Detail: The carefully placed pocket graphic provides an artistic touch without overwhelming the design, making it a perfect piece for layering or wearing solo.
  • Ideal For: This shirt is an excellent gift idea for friends, family, or for yourself. It's perfect for casual outings, college wear, or weekend activities.

Material Care: Machine wash cold with like colors for best results. Dry on low.
